title: Statkraft and Fortescue Renegotiate Power Agreement for Holmaneset Green Hydrogen and Green Ammonia Project in Norway
content: Statkraft and Fortescue have agreed to amend and extend their conditional power agreement for the Holmaneset green hydrogen and green ammonia project in Norway. The renegotiated terms extend the agreement timeframe to 2029 and update the contract to cover a 10-year power supply period. Currently in the feasibility phase, the project requires this extension to allow Fortescue sufficient time to progress with necessary studies and regulatory approvals. Hallvard Granheim, Executive Vice President for Markets at Statkraft, stated that the agreement reflects their priority to offer competitive power solutions for green industrial development. Fortescue Project Director Gabriela Celin confirmed that the amendments support the project's ongoing development timeline. The Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) remains conditional upon the project achieving financial close and the commencement of commercial operations.
author: Analysts Account
